channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Gwadar Explained: Why Pak's Chinese-Backed Port Keeps Coming Under Attack

media:content.media:description: China developed Gwadar Port as a strategic and commercial hub under its Belt and Road Initiative. (File)

item.description: For the people of Gwadar, stability isn't an abstract goal. It's the chance to send a child to school without worrying about a sudden deadline of violence
item.content:encoded: For the people of Gwadar, stability isn't an abstract goal. It's the chance to send a child to school without worrying about a sudden deadline of violence

item.title: China's New Ethnic Unity Law Raises Alarm Over Overseas Crackdown

media:content.media:description: China's National People's Congress passed the law on March 12.

item.description: The law legally consolidates President Xi Jinping's constant efforts to establish a national identity and promote the idea of a single "Chinese nation".
item.content:encoded: The law legally consolidates President Xi Jinping's constant efforts to establish a national identity and promote the idea of a single "Chinese nation".

item.title: From Zia To 'Holy War', State Policy Built Pak's Extremist Ecosystem

media:content.media:description: Terror assembled by deliberate design cannot be credibly disowned onto a neighbour

item.description: Pakistan treats radicalisation as something that happened to Pakistan rather than something the state itself cultivated
item.content:encoded: Pakistan treats radicalisation as something that happened to Pakistan rather than something the state itself cultivated

item.title: "Mentally Unstable": Government Sources Slam Pak's Khawaja Asif For Attack On PM Modi

media:content.media:description: Government sources said Pakistan's criticism reflected "envy" rather than facts.

item.description: The Seychelles government categorically rejected suggestions that the award was fabricated or created for PM Modi's visit.
item.content:encoded: The Seychelles government categorically rejected suggestions that the award was fabricated or created for PM Modi's visit.

item.title: Watch: Trump Displays One Of Oldest US Flags At 'America250' Event

media:content.media:description: Trump said the historic flags had witnessed some of the important moments in US history.

item.description: Unlike the well-known Betsy Ross flag, which has the stars arranged in a circle, this flag has the stars placed in three rows in a 4-5-4 pattern, Trump said.
item.content:encoded: Unlike the well-known Betsy Ross flag, which has the stars arranged in a circle, this flag has the stars placed in three rows in a 4-5-4 pattern, Trump said.

item.title: Ali Khamenei's 3 Sons Attend Funeral In Tehran, Successor Mojtaba Skips

media:content.media:description: The ceremonies will conclude on July 9, when Ali Khamenei is buried at the Imam Reza shrine in Mashhad

item.description: State television showed three of Ali Khamenei's sons, Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud Khamenei, standing behind their father's coffin during funeral prayers at Tehran's Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla
item.content:encoded: State television showed three of Ali Khamenei's sons, Mostafa, Meysam and Masoud Khamenei, standing behind their father's coffin during funeral prayers at Tehran's Imam Khomeini Grand Mosalla

item.title: Trump Earns $636 Million As Memecoin Investors Lose $3.8 Billion: Report
item.description: The report found that 988,905 crypto wallets, representing roughly two out of every three buyers of the $TRUMP memecoin, were at a loss by the end of June.
item.content:encoded: The report found that 988,905 crypto wallets, representing roughly two out of every three buyers of the $TRUMP memecoin, were at a loss by the end of June.

item.title: Trump's Patriotism vs Partisan Politics Goof-Up At US 250th Birthday Celebrations

media:content.media:description: The speech capped a holiday that Trump has gone to great lengths to shape to his own tastes.

item.description: Donald Trump leaned into partisan territory unusual for an Independence Day address, which presidents typically use as a moment to unify the country.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump leaned into partisan territory unusual for an Independence Day address, which presidents typically use as a moment to unify the country.

item.title: After Tariff Relief, Belgian Firm Gifts Trump Ring With 321 Diamonds, 6 Rubies

media:content.media:description: The gift comes months after Belgium's diamond industry won the removal of US tariffs on diamond imports.

item.description: All told, 321 diamonds, 56 sapphires, 13 emeralds and six rubies encrust the watch-sized gold ring presented this week to Bill White, the US ambassador to Belgium, to give to US President Donald Trump.
item.content:encoded: All told, 321 diamonds, 56 sapphires, 13 emeralds and six rubies encrust the watch-sized gold ring presented this week to Bill White, the US ambassador to Belgium, to give to US President Donald Trump.

item.title: "Quit Immediately": Pakistan Deputy PM Faces Flak After Grandson Arrested For Rape

media:content.media:description: Police sources said Raza Dar is Ishaq Dar's grandson.

item.description: Senator Faisal Vawda also accused the federal government and the provincial government in Punjab of protecting the minister's relative in the high-profile case.
item.content:encoded: Senator Faisal Vawda also accused the federal government and the provincial government in Punjab of protecting the minister's relative in the high-profile case.

item.title: 'Death To America, Death To Israel' Chants Echo At Khamenei's Funeral In Iran

media:content.media:description: The funeral was delayed as the war raged

item.description: The comment represents the first, direct call for Trump's death by an emcee at the funeral, which has seen posters and graffiti calling for the killing of Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
item.content:encoded: The comment represents the first, direct call for Trump's death by an emcee at the funeral, which has seen posters and graffiti calling for the killing of Trump and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.

item.title: Dollar Bills With Trump's Signature Rolls Out As US Marks 250 Years

media:content.media:description: Trump has been eager to put his stamp - and his name - on institutions throughout the country

item.description: Traditionally, US paper currency contains the signature of the treasury secretary and the US treasurer, not the president.
item.content:encoded: Traditionally, US paper currency contains the signature of the treasury secretary and the US treasurer, not the president.

item.title: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei Funeral News Updates: Thousands Gather In Iran As Funeral Rites For Khamenei Enter Second Day

media:content.media:description: Iran Former Supreme Leader's Khamenei Funeral: Ayatollah Ali Khamenei's remains arrived in Tehran today.

item.description: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Sunday has been declared a public holiday for the entire country, and in the evening, Khamenei's body will leave the Grand Mosalla complex
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei's Last Rites News Live: Sunday has been declared a public holiday for the entire country, and in the evening, Khamenei's body will leave the Grand Mosalla complex

item.title: US Nurse Fired Over Video Suggesting She Avoids Patients Watching Fox News

media:content.media:description: Many users accused her of violating the ethical responsibilities of healthcare professionals.

item.description: Healthcare professionals are expected to provide care to all patients without discrimination, regardless of their political beliefs or personal views.
item.content:encoded: Healthcare professionals are expected to provide care to all patients without discrimination, regardless of their political beliefs or personal views.

item.title: 'Thought People Hated Him': Trump On Iranians Crying At Khamenei's Funeral

media:content.media:description: Trump expressed surprise over Iranians crying at the funeral.

item.description: Ali Khamenei, who ruled Iran for 36 years, was killed on February 28 - the day the US and Israel began striking Iran, triggering a war in the Middle East.
item.content:encoded: Ali Khamenei, who ruled Iran for 36 years, was killed on February 28 - the day the US and Israel began striking Iran, triggering a war in the Middle East.

item.title: On Camera, Indonesian Troops Recover Body Of US Pilot Killed By Papua Rebels

media:content.media:description: The evacuation involved 10 personnel from the Habema Operations Command

item.description: Nicholas F Goselin, a pilot for Indonesian aviation company PT AMA, was shot dead Thursday shortly after he landed at the Ipdeheik airstrip in the mountainous province of Papua Highlands.
item.content:encoded: Nicholas F Goselin, a pilot for Indonesian aviation company PT AMA, was shot dead Thursday shortly after he landed at the Ipdeheik airstrip in the mountainous province of Papua Highlands.

item.title: Crypto Horror In Gang-Rape Case Linked To Pakistan Deputy PM's Grandson

media:content.media:description: A Lahore court has remanded four suspects to five days of police custody

item.description: The allegations involve Raza Dar, who, the news agency PTI, citing police sources, said, is the grandson of Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar.
item.content:encoded: The allegations involve Raza Dar, who, the news agency PTI, citing police sources, said, is the grandson of Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar.

item.title: Iran Confirms Hormuz Transit Fees, Offers "Special Treatment" For "Friends"

media:content.media:description: Iran lifted its blockade of the Hormuz after it struck an initial deal with the US

item.description: The strait normally carries one-fifth of the world's crude oil and liquefied natural gas, but it was all but closed by Iran during the Middle East war, sending energy prices soaring.
item.content:encoded: The strait normally carries one-fifth of the world's crude oil and liquefied natural gas, but it was all but closed by Iran during the Middle East war, sending energy prices soaring.

item.title: "He Knows Who The Boss Is": Trump On Possible Netanyahu White House Visit

media:content.media:description: The two men last met on February 11 in Washington

item.description: The possible meeting comes amid reports of tensions between the two leaders over efforts to end the war against Iran that the US and Israel started in late February.
item.content:encoded: The possible meeting comes amid reports of tensions between the two leaders over efforts to end the war against Iran that the US and Israel started in late February.

item.title: 'Courts Can't Second-Guess Prosecutors': US Department Of Justice On Adani Case

media:content.media:description: The Constitution vests the prosecutorial power in the Executive, not the Judiciary, it said.

item.description: The department said courts have traditionally accepted brief motions seeking dismissal of criminal cases because demanding more detailed explanations could expose privileged internal deliberations.
item.content:encoded: The department said courts have traditionally accepted brief motions seeking dismissal of criminal cases because demanding more detailed explanations could expose privileged internal deliberations.
